title: Marine Protection (Amendment) Regulations 2026
text:
SECOND SUPPLEMENT TO THE GIBRALTAR
GAZETTE
No. 5297 GIBRALTAR Thursday 9th April 2026
LEGAL NOTICE NO. 74 OF 2026
NATURE PROTECTION ACT 1991
MARINE PROTECTION (AMENDMENT) REGULATIONS 2026
In exercise of the powers conferred upon it under sections 13, 18 and 24 of the Nature
Protection Act 1991 and all other enabling powers, and after consultation with the Nature
Conservancy Council, the Government has made the following Regulations -
Title.
1. These Regulations may be cited as the Marine Protection (Amendment) Regulations 2026.
Commencement.
2. These Regulations come into operation on the date of publication.
Amendment to the Marine Protection Regulations 2014.
3. The Marine Protection Regulations 2014 are amended in regulations 15(2) and 21(2)(e) by
substituting “15 October to 15 April” with “1 October and 30 April” in both instances it
appears.
Dated: 9th April 2026.
PROF J CORTES,
Minister with responsibility for the Environment,
For the Government.
EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM
These Regulations amend the periods for shore fishing under a Class B permit and underwater
fishing under a Class C permit.
